title: Binary financial referendum-style decision over 6 polling rounds

events.description: Silvergate Bank announced it would wind down operations and liquidate, which significantly heightened market anxiety regarding the banking sector
SVB Financial Group announced a $1.8 billion loss from selling securities and a plan to raise $2.25 billion in capital, triggering investor panic
Moody’s Investors Service notified Silicon Valley Bank of a potential credit rating downgrade, further eroding market confidence
Venture capital firms advised portfolio companies to withdraw their funds from SVB, leading to a massive bank run
The REGION Department of Financial Protection and Innovation closed Silicon Valley Bank and appointed the FDIC as receiver
U.S. regulators announced that all PRO_SUPPORTER_1 at SVB would be fully protected and have access to their money, aiming to stem systemic panic

agents.name: PRO_LEADER_1
agents.description: Central bank aiming to maintain financial stability

agents.name: PRO_LEADER_2
agents.description: COUNTRY Treasury Secretary providing public assurances

agents.name: NEUTRAL_1
agents.description: Reporting on bank runs and systemic risk

agents.name: PRO_SUPPORTER_1
agents.description: General public concerned about savings safety

agents.name: AGAINST_LEADER_1
agents.description: Viral spreaders of bank run panic

notes: Blinded: entity names, geography, and absolute dates redacted. Numeric fields preserved.
